name: White Hot Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/4 cup of the half-and half or light cream, white chocolate chips, cinnamon stick, and nutmeg in a medium saucepan. Whisk over low heat until the white chocolate chips are melted. Remove the cinnamon stick.
2. Add the remaining half and half or cream. Whisk until heated through. Remove from heat. Stir in vanilla extract and almond extract.
3. Serve warm in mugs. Sprinkle with cinnamon, if desired. Light cream can be used instead of half-and-half, if desired.
